prompt: Promptcharacter@character: Young woman, early-to-mid 20s, relatable everyday appearance, oversized cream hoodie, minimal jewelry, hair in a loose messy bun, soft natural makeup, phone-selfie energy, warm and genuine personality — talks like she's telling a friend, not reading a script. Maintain consistent identity, clothing, and appearance throughout.Location: Cozy bedroom/study space, daytime. Desk with laptop, notebook and pen beside it, string lights, water bottle, soft natural window light, lived-in but tidy. Authentic, non-staged. No studio lighting, no ring light glare, no branded backdrop.Visual Style: Authentic UGC/testimonial realism. Vertical phone-shot aesthetic. Direct-to-camera talking style, one continuous selfie-style take. Natural imperfections — framing drift, casual re-adjustments, genuine reactions.
